title: MAS Section Builder Subagent Task
description: Per-section handoff contract a section-builder subagent receives. Apply-only: the subagent creates elements and applies existing classes under one parent node; it never creates classes, pages, or components.

section_id.description: Which section slice this subagent owns, e.g. 'hero'.

parent_node_id.description: Webflow node ID of the section container created by the parent in Phase 2A. Subagent inserts children only under this node.

html_contract.description: Section HTML slice with Client-First tags and final class names. Intermediate contract only; recreated via native element operations, never pushed via whtml_builder.

cf_classes.description: Every class this section applies. All must already exist on the Webflow canvas before the subagent runs.

mode.description: Subagent contract mode. Always apply_only: no class/page/component creation.
